item.title: FULL PODDY: NICKSON HAS SOME NEWS... 😢
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: NICKSON HAS SOME NEWS... 😢
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Nickson made an announcement today, that he will be leaving The Edge to pursue a new direction, a move that will be great for him and his wife Sarah! We’ll miss him greatly even though he’s an asshole <3 (ps. No he did not get cancelled despite his best efforts). His last show is tomorrow :(
  • Shaz and Steph are back from their trip to Melbourne to see Taylor Swift! And holy hecka did they have an amazing time. They even managed to embarrass themselves at a hella boujee restaurant with Meg from The Edge Breakfast.
  • While the girls were in Aussie, they caught up with Oliver Mills - The guy who got the “22 Hat” from Taylor Swift!
  • Papa Nicksy comes back for one last time, and his advice is more out the gate than ever…

PLUS HEAPS MORE! AND FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn, Steph and Nickson - @Edgeafternoons

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Steph @stephmonksey

Nickson @thenicksonclark

Producer Arun @arunjamesbeard

Cousin Clara @claracraig

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: KICKONS: ARUN'S NIP, BREASTMILK & BBQING BABIES
item.itunes:title: KICKONS: ARUN'S NIP, BREASTMILK & BBQING BABIES
item.description:
Kickons is all about having some cooked NSFW chat, ya know the kind of cooked shit you say after smashing back some bevvys, polishing off a bottle of wine at a BYO and rounding it off with balloons and whipped cream 👀

ON TODAYS KICKONS:

  • Nickson has a bone to pick with Producer Arun, more specifically, Producer Arun's nipples...
  • Of course this leads onto how breastfeeding works, and Nickson & Producer Arun get hella curious and ask all the questions guys are too afraid to ask.
  • Steph is throwing a baby bbq! (No it doesn't involve bbqing babies...)

Hope you enjoy xxx

Love, Sharyn, Steph, Nickson, Producer Arun & Cousin Clara xxx

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: FULL PODDY: IS IT BAD TO BULLY STEPH FOR BEING PREGGO? 🤰
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: IS IT BAD TO BULLY STEPH FOR BEING PREGGO? 🤰
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • The girls are still in Aussie and head to Taylor Swift tonight! And Sharyn made Aussie news! Kinda...
  • We keep running late to meetings because we get stuck behind ole pregnant Steph, so we get it off our chests with you listener pals.
  • Nickson ate shit today.... Literally...

item.title: FULL PODDY: LIVE FROM MELBOURNE!!! 🦘
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: LIVE FROM MELBOURNE!!! 🦘
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Shaz and Steph are in Melbourne to see Taylor Swift on her Eras Tour! So Sharyn hits the streets to try and track her down, and lets just say she had some success...
  • Nickson witnessed some reeeal 1st world problems today, so you listener pals join in a good old fashioned whinge...
  • Sharyn ended up making the news on Channel 10 Melbourne as a crazy Taylor Swift fan!

item.title: FULL PODDY: WE DATE CAL FROM EDGE NIGHTS ❤️
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: WE DATE CAL FROM EDGE NIGHTS ❤️
item.description:
PSA: Sorry there was no poddy yesterday! Producer Arun's computer sucks and he had some technical difficulties...

Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Happy Valentines Day! Nickson & Producer Arun are already in their partners good books, so we ask you how yours has been so far! Is your significant other in the dog box or in the doggystylebox ;)
  • Sharyn & Steph head to Aussie tomorrow for Taylor Swift! Although there's a chance Sharyn might get arrested at the border due to some crimes she has recently committed...
  • We stitch Cal from The Edge Nights up and get him to speed date listener pals with "Calentines," and it goes about as badly as you think lol

PLUS HEAPS MORE! AND FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn, Steph and Nickson - @Edgeafternoons

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Steph @stephmonksey

Nickson @thenicksonclark

Producer Arun @arunjamesbeard

Cousin Clara @claracraig

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: FULL PODDY: NICKSON HAD A TANTRUM TODAY 😬
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: NICKSON HAD A TANTRUM TODAY 😬
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • The Superbowl happend today, and there were a lot of people in the office slacking off to watch it, so we put them to the test to find out if they're true fans...
  • Producer Arun had another bender, so we had to find out if he woke up somewhere random again (spoiler alert, he did...)
  • If a mate gets turned away from the club, do you all leave or just say "nah bol, we're going in"?

PLUS HEAPS MORE! AND FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn, Steph and Nickson - @Edgeafternoons

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Steph @stephmonksey

item.title: FULL PODDY: NICKSON AKA MANESKIN 👨‍🎤
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: NICKSON AKA MANESKIN 👨‍🎤
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Every Friday we get you to SAY THAT SHIT WITH UR CHEST HON! Aaand today. Nickson & Sharyn didn’t hold back and it got hella awkward…
  • Steph opens up to the team about her OCD and shares why you shouldn’t just throw the term “OCD” around.
  • The Simpsons are back at it again predicting the future! Guess what they’ve predicted this time…

item.title: FULL PODCAST: USHER JOINS US ON THE SHOW 🤥
item.itunes:title: FULL PODCAST: USHER JOINS US ON THE SHOW 🤥
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • What's in Nickson's Brain? Today he reckons he knows what's causing global warming...
  • Steph manages to get us an interview with USHER, and in true Steph fashion you won't be disappointed.
  • Does anyone still use traffic as an excuse for being late anymore??? We ask you listener pals.

PLUS HEAPS MORE! AND FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

item.title: FULL PODDY: "I ACCIDENTALLY FLASHED MY B*TTH*LE" 🍑
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: "I ACCIDENTALLY FLASHED MY B*TTH*LE" 🍑
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Well well well, with our Taylor Swift comp kicking off today our phonelines were JAMMED! So we decided to have a little fun with it, we asked you listener whānau to hit us with a 5 word teaser to and incredible story so we’d call you back, and you didn’t disappoint…
  • NZ Singer PAIGE was on the show today talking about the possibility of her teaming up with the Jobros…
  • Nickson Investigates: Shop Assistants, what do we really want from them when we’re in store?
  • Steph flopped a bittie out at the beach, so we ask you when you accidentally flashed someone… Three words, boobies & butt hole…

PLUS HEAPS MORE! AND FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn, Steph and Nickson - @Edgeafternoons

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Steph @stephmonksey

Nickson @thenicksonclark

Producer Arun @arunjamesbeard

Cousin Clara @claracraig

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Well well well, with our Taylor Swift comp kicking off today our phonelines were JAMMED! So we decided to have a little fun with it, we asked you listener whānau to hit us with a 5 word teaser to and incredible story so we’d call you back, and you didn’t disappoint…
  • NZ Singer PAIGE was on the show today talking about the possibility of her teaming up with the Jobros…
  • Nickson Investigates: Shop Assistants, what do we really want from them when we’re in store?
  • Steph flopped a bittie out at the beach, so we ask you when you accidentally flashed someone… Three words, boobies & butt hole…

PLUS HEAPS MORE! AND FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: IS THIS ILLEGAL? 👮🚨
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Damn, you know when you do those things that feel illegal but aren’t? But definitely should be… We go there and ask you for some “illegal” feeling things…
  • Steph does some deep diving into the internet and found out there’s one thing in your bathroom that is making you hella sick… And it’s not what you think!
  • We throw it back to primary school and reminisce about our best memories there, as you can imagine, Nickson was a little shit.

item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Nickson tries to get Sharyn’s husband Bryce in the dog box and definitely gets his wires crossed. Shaz confronts Bryce on air and it gets hella awkward…
  • Steph’s holding a PAK’NSAVE trolley hostage, so we call the voice of Stickman - Paul Ego, and make some demands for the safe return of the trolley…
  • We take a look into Nickson’s brain, where he shares some of the weird thoughts that come to his head…
  • After Angus the Countdown Cat in Upper Hutt passed away, we ask you to tell us about your local legends…

item.title: FULL PODDY: SHAZ STAYED IN A SEX DEN ⛓️🍆
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: SHAZ STAYED IN A SEX DEN ⛓️🍆
item.description:
Kia ora Edge listener whānau, welcome to our show catchup podcast! If you missed us on-air, don’t worry, all of our goodness gets compiled into one podcast for you, so you can listen whenever and wherever you want!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • Kaylee Bell & Navvy come in studio to tell us about their new song Life Is Tough (but so am i).
  • Nickson’s officiating a wedding where the couple don’t want to kiss in front of everyone at the ceremony… Is this weird or normal? We hear about your weird wedding stories and they are SCANDALOUS.
  • National MP Tom Rutherford says he can get us into Parliament Pool, and reveals a secret about the Beehive…
  • Shaz stayed in an AirBnB over summer, after posting some pics of it people started telling her it was a SEX DEN WTAF.
  • And a listener pal DM’d us about her ex flatties ex who she started seeing, should she tell her ex flattie about it?

PLUS HEAPS MORE! AND FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn, Steph and Nickson - @Edgeafternoons

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Steph @stephmonksey

Nickson @thenicksonclark

Producer Arun @arunjamesbeard

Cousin Clara @claracraig

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: FULL PODDY: 2024 IS GONNA BE OUR B*TCH! 💥💥
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: 2024 IS GONNA BE OUR B*TCH! 💥💥
item.description:
WE ARE BACK BABYYYY! We’re rested, rowdy, rauncy and a little rusty according to Producer Arun (he can get in the bin). But holy hecka do we have a great show to kick off the year!

Check out some of our fave parts of the show below:

  • We have a new member of the show, MEET COUSIN CLARA!!! She’s one of our new producers and you bet we’re making her feel uncomfortable already.
  • Nickson couldn’t stop thinking about the show over the break and pitches ideas for the show for this year! One of them involves our undies…
  • We predict all the biggest things that are gonna happen in 2024… Then catch us at the end of the year checking back on them!

Peace out biatch's. See you in 2024! Oh and FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn, Steph and Nickson - @edgeafternoons

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Steph @stephmonksey

Nickson @thenicksonclark

item.title: SPECIAL: MERRY CHRISTMAS YA FILTHY ANIMALS!!! 🎅
item.itunes:title: SPECIAL: MERRY CHRISTMAS YA FILTHY ANIMALS!!! 🎅
item.description:
SURPRISE!!! Meri Kirihimete whānau, we showed up on Xmas day to surprise you with a special show! So many NZ celebs came and joined us for a yarn and to tell us what they've been up to on Xmas Day.

  • The Coterie Boys
  • Uncle Tics
  • Matua Paddy G
  • Kaylee Bell
  • Matt from Drax Project
  • Grunta with a special xmas joke
  • Jason Kelce! (kinda as per)
  • AND OF COURSE SANTA JOINS US!

Plus heaps more guests! We hope you enjoy and you all had a great day with friends & whānau.

Lots of love, Sharyn, Steph, Nickson & Producer Arun xx

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: FULL PODDY: AND WITH THAT, THE 2023 SEASON COMES TO AN END ✌️
item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY: AND WITH THAT, THE 2023 SEASON COMES TO AN END ✌️
item.description:
Ka kite Edge whānau! That is us for 2023 done and dusted… We ended on some highs by finding out the number 1 song in 2023 with The Edge Top 100 and we did one final what a feeling to wrap where you tell us the best thing that happened to you this year.

PLUS HEAPS MORE! Have a little lookylala below at what else went on:

  • We called a random Carol so we could get sung Christmas Carols from Carol
  • We yarned to the one and only Teddy Swims!
  • You guys tell us about your end of year pranks at high school.

Peace out biatch's. See you in 2024! Oh and FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn, Steph and Nickson - @Edgeafternoons

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Steph @stephmonksey

item.itunes:title: FULL PODDY - WHERE THE EFF DO TRADIES GO TO THE TOILET?!
item.description:
Kia ora Edge whānau! LUCKY YOU YOU GET 2 PODCASTS TODAY! Jk, Producer Arun forgot to upload Fridays one, don’t tell Casey the boss hehe…

Today (Friday) we talked to a good friend of ours Jim Cawthorne about how he lost his 2 daughters because he didn’t listen to his wife, we get you guys to share your good news with what a feeling, and we call parliament to see if they will let us swim in the parliament pool!

PLUS HEAPS MORE! Have a little lookylala below at what else went on:

  • If someone tells you not to bring anything for a bbq or dinner, you’re still most likely to. So we ask you what you’d prefer to be brought!
  • Where the eff do tradies go to the toilet?! We call a few to bust the age old question.
  • You guys tell us when you didn’t follow instructions and JESUS PEOPLE turn on your taringa!

item.itunes:title: FULL PODCAST: THE HUMAN SANTAPEDE IS ALIVE! 🎅
item.description:
Kia ora Edge whānau! THE DAY HAS FINALLY ARRIVED! Our Xmas cards arrived! We teamed up with www.thewildones.co.nz to make our crack up xmas cards. Make sure you go and check them out!

PLUS HEAPS MORE! Have a little lookylala below at what else went on:

  • Kaylee Bell came in for a chat to talk about life in the US, winning a Country Music Award AND her NZ tour
  • Apparently everyone whose name starts with a J is toxic… So we had all the J people rejoice and tell us why they’re actually lovely humans!
  • Papa Nicksy is back with some great life advice, and damn some deep stuff is coming through. You sure you want Nickson’s advice on your marriage?!

Peace out biatch's. Oh and FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

item.description:
Kia ora Edge whānau! WE’RE ALL BACK BABYYY!!!! Well kinda, Shaz is doing the show from home as she’s still texting pozzy for covid and being a GB. But today we talk about Nickson’s trip to Perth to see Coldplay, Steph found an old mixed CD she created back in 2004 and we tell you the signs you need to look out for if a guy isn’t into you!

PLUS HEAPS MORE! Have a little lookylala below at what else went on:

  • Is Nickson an asshole? Usually the answer would be yes but on this occasion we think he was in the right! What do you reckon?

PLUS HEAPS MORE! Have a little lookylala below at what else went on:

  • Steph blows our mind and tells us WHY James Bond drinks shaken martinis.

Kia ora Edge whānau! In the words of Nickson “WOAHZERS” we had a big week and we rounded it off with it stonker. Steph calls her partner Jake to confront him about some antics in bed last night, we talk about the infamous “Marry Me Chicken” to see if it actually works and for the final “Politi-Grill” we had Natioal Party Leader Chris Luxon!

PLUS HEAPS MORE! Have a little lookylala below at what else went on:

item.itunes:title: FULL PODCAST: WHY DO WE MEASURE PENIS'S IN INCHES? 🍆
item.description:
Kia ora Edge whānau! Today we yarned about the gross things you do with your partner that makes you realise you really love them, we let you into a guys brain to figure out how they show if they like you or not and Nickson is back with a hard hitting Nickson Investigates - Why do we measure everything in cms but penis’s and TVs are in inches?

PLUS HEAPS MORE! Have a little lookylala below at what else went on:

  • We eliminate another Flat from Flat Wars
  • Steph made a new friend while she was home sick, and they’re not human…

item.title: EXTRA: WHERE MY SWEATY PEOPLE AT?
item.itunes:title: EXTRA: WHERE MY SWEATY PEOPLE AT?
item.description:
SSRI's, Anti Anxiety & Antidepressants have a super common side effect of NIGHT SWEATS and it's awful!!!

On this special podcast we talk to an expert, get some info on everyday ways to help relieve it and come together to realize we're not weird!

PSA - If you are experiencing frequent night sweats always speak to your doctor.

LINKS:
Bunning pet cooling mat Pillar 900 x 600mm Pet Cooling Mat - Bunnings New Zealand

Cooling T shirt - Awakening T-Shirt | by Natalie

Share with your mates and thanks heaps for listening!
Follow us on Instagram
@edgeafternoons
@sharyncasey
@nicksonclark

Follow us on Tik Tok
@theedgenz

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: NEW ZEALAND SIGN LANGUAGE WEEK
item.itunes:title: NEW ZEALAND SIGN LANGUAGE WEEK
item.description:
We were honored to be joined by sign language interpreters and community advocate Jon from https://www.instagram.com/deafaotearoa/ to sign our show for New Zealand sign language week!

This was an incredible reminder to get behind one of our national languages and raise awareness for the deaf community in Aotearoa.

Check out their website here: https://nzslweek.org.nz/

you can also find the dictionary for different signs here: https://www.nzsl.nz/

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.itunes:title: NICKSON BECOMES A BATTERY CHICKEN
item.description:
26/01/23: Today Nickson un-cancelled himself for his chicken chat yesterday. Sharyn tries to call her dad to give us a joke, he hangs up on her and so does the rest of her family. We listen to some voice memos from the dating app Hinge, and we have beef with the breakfast show.


PODCAST PLAYLIST:

  • SHARYN'S WHOLE FAMILY IGNORES HER
  • THE BEST HINGE VOICE MEMOS
  • NICKSON BECOMES A CHICKEN AND UN-CANCELLS HIMSELF
  • EDGE BREAKFAST BEEF


FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn, Steph and Nickson - @Edgeafternoons

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Steph @stephmonksey

Nickson @thenicksonclark

Happy Listening, we appreciate you and don’t forget to give us a cheeky rating xx

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: NICKSON RUBS ONE OUT IN SHARYNS ROOM

item.description:

item.title: SHARYN, STEPH AND NICKSON: YOUR FIRST TASTE OF THE NEW SHOW
item.itunes:title: SHARYN, STEPH AND NICKSON: YOUR FIRST TASTE OF THE NEW SHOW
item.description:
Hey! Sharyn, Steph and Nickson here - we thought we'd jump behind the mic and give you a little taster of what the new show is going to sound like for 2023. This mini podcast is a little all over place, which is a perfect representation of what the year will be. We'll catch you one week from now, first show kicks off Wednesday 25th January!!!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
